scripts.evidence:check: node scripts/index-recorded-evidence.mjs --run run-005 --check && node scripts/index-recorded-evidence.mjs --run run-006 --check
scripts.runtime:check: node --test tests/studio-runtime-production.test.ts tests/studio-owned-swarm-orchestration.test.ts tests/studio-semantic-evidence.test.ts tests/studio-study-report-admission.test.ts tests/studio-owned-media-study.test.ts tests/studio-multimodal-admission.test.ts tests/studio-orchestrator-executor-contract.test.ts tests/studio-owned-swarm-real-codex.test.ts tests/studio-child-media-bridge.test.ts tests/studio-child-evidence-bridge.test.ts tests/studio-child-evidence-assessment-bridge.test.ts tests/studio-production-adapter.test.ts tests/studio-runtime-validation.test.ts tests/studio-executor-contract.test.ts tests/studio-runtime-inspector.test.ts tests/studio-run-start-production.test.ts tests/studio-runtime-host.test.ts tests/studio-caption-production.test.ts tests/studio-local-runtime-client.test.ts tests/studio-forecast-production.test.ts tests/studio-memory-inspection.test.ts
scripts.runtime:smoke:codex: test -n "$STUDIO_OWNED_SWARM_MODEL" && node scripts/run-local-worker.ts --source-directory public/demo/runs/run-005 --source-language-mode declared --source-language ko --target-language en --language-pack ko-v3 --output-depth evidence --model "$STUDIO_OWNED_SWARM_MODEL"
